message:
feat(engine): add 221 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Sixteenth batch of enrichment tests:

- remote_computation_registry: 48 tests (name validation, schema
  compatibility, capability enforcement, version negotiation)
- render_lane_specializer: 51 tests (lane kinds, safety checks,
  benefit computation, specialization decisions, batch processing)
- reproducibility_provenance_pack: 44 tests (toolchain fingerprints,
  artifact manifests, dependency snapshots, legal assessment)
- revocation_chain: 38 tests (chain operations, hash linking,
  verification, duplicate/zone-mismatch rejection, audit events)
- revocation_enforcement: 40 tests (enforcement points, token
  acceptance, high-risk operations, batch checks, statistics)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
